mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_NUMBER, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_DATE AS INQUIRY_DATE, ANSWER_STATUS, INQUIRY_POST, TO_CHAR(ANSWER_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS ANSWER_DATE, ANSWER_POST FROM DDD_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_NUMBER = #{inquiryNumber} AND USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_INQUIRY ( INQUIRY_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_POST, INQUIRY_DATE, ANSWER_STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_INQUIRY.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryPost}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
